---
title: "Long Paths and 8.3 Filename Fallbacks"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
---

This note preserves the troubleshooting logic from the legacy R Markdown file. The original project used long source-like folder names so paths would remain transparent. That decision made the data provenance legible, but it also made path handling brittle on some systems.

The reusable readers now live in `R/io/read_long_paths.R`. The new repo structure keeps raw data local and uses `data/metadata/file_manifest.csv` to make the source-path mapping auditable without forcing every path into the analysis code.
